Description: Uniquely identifies a dissemination block (composed of the 2-digit province/territory unique identifier followed by the 2-digit census division code, the 4-digit dissemination area code and the 3-digit dissemination block code).
Dissemination block population.
Uniquely identifies a dissemination area (composed of the 2-digit province/territory unique identifier followed by the 2-digit census division code and the 4-digit dissemination area code).
Dissemination area population.
Uniquely identifies a census subdivision (composed of the 2-digit province/territory unique identifier followed by the 2-digit census division code and the 3-digit census subdivision code).
Census subdivision name.
Census subdivisions are classified according to designations adopted by provincial/territorial or federal authorities.
Census subdivision population.
Uniquely identifies a census metropolitan area/census agglomeration.

Uniquely identifies the provincial/territorial part of a census metropolitan area/census agglomeration (composed of the 2-digit province/territory unique identifier followed by the 3-digit census metropolitan area/census agglomeration unique identifier).
Census metropolitan area or census agglomeration name.
A one-character field identifying whether the unit is a census metropolitan area, a tracted census agglomeration or a nontracted census agglomeration.
Census metropolitan area population.
Uniquely identifies a province or territory.
Province or territory name.
Province or territory population.
Longitude of the dissemination block's representative point (EPSG 4326).
Latitude of the dissemination block's representative point (EPSG 4326).
Indicates whether at least one source of employment exists within the boundaries of a dissemination block.
Normalised value of a dissemination block's proximity to employment.
Indicates whether at least one pharmacy or drug store exists within the boundaries of a dissemination block.
Normalised value of a dissemination block's proximity to pharmacy and drug stores.
Indicates whether at least one childcare facility exists within the boundaries of a dissemination block.
Normalised value of a dissemination block's proximity to child care facilities.
Indicates whether at least one health facility exists within the boundaries of a dissemination block.
Normalised value of a dissemination block's proximity to health facilities.
Indicates whether at least one grocery store exists within the boundaries of a dissemination block.
Normalised value of a dissemination block's proximity to grocery stores.
Indicates whether at least one primary education facility exists within the boundaries of a dissemination block.
Normalised value of a dissemination block's proximity to primary education facilities.
Indicates whether at least one secondary education facility exists within the boundaries of a dissemination block.
Normalised value of a dissemination block's proximity to secondary education facilities.
Indicates whether at least one library exists within the boundaries of a dissemination block.
Normalised value of a dissemination block's proximity to libraries.
Indicates whether at least one park exists within the boundaries of a dissemination block.
Normalised value of a dissemination block's proximity to parks.
Indicates whether at least one transit stop exists within the boundaries of a dissemination block.
Normalised value of a dissemination block's proximity to transit trips.
Indicates whether a dissemination block is an amenity dense neighbourhood, a high amenity density neighbourhood, or a non-amenity dense neighbourhood.
